Topic

Key Discussions

Next Steps

Tooling & Infrastructure: Best Practices for Data Transformation

  • Reviewing Project Alpha Activity performance

  • Business Intelligence model refactoring: step-by-step guideline & implementation plan

  • Cloud Stack: limitations & workarounds

  • Both teams: We've decided to move forward with a POC project to put these ideas into practice.

  • Internal team: discuss internally to define the POC scope and determine how the external team can best contribute.

Data Monetization with Dashboard Embedding

Use Case Ideation: We brainstormed several promising use cases for data monetization:

  • Inventory Integrity: Real-time tracking of assets to ensure supply chain integrity.

  • Network Intelligence: Providing market intelligence and failure analysis for the logistics network.

  • Internal team: involve business teams to develop ideas for data monetization

  • External team: stay in the loop to share platform demo and provide technical consultation as needed.

New Insights in System Activity

  • Insight #1: Limit post-query processing usage (pivots, totals/ grand totals)

  • Insight #2: Reduce query complexity from Warehouse design

  • Insight #3: Reduce Cloud Cost from Dashboarding Tool

    • Not a current priority as organization is promoting adoption

    • Cost estimation from compute slots is available

  • Other discussions:

    • Board monitoring

    • Multi-instance use case

  • Internal team: review the first two insights

  • External team: explore the demo_board data availability & insights
